productDisplayName: Biotique Women Bio Dandelion Ageless Lightening Serum
description: This lightening serum is a rare combination of pure dandelion, rich in Vitamin E and minerals, blended with nutmeg oil. Used regularly, it helps brighten skin, fade dark spots and ease away wrinkles for a flawless complexion.Skin type- For every skin regimeUsage- Massage a few drops into cleansed face and neck, before moisturizer, morning and evening.
